description: baseline: 50 selfplay games + train it1 on (it10 + new) for 10min
cleandata: only it7-9 + new (overfit, smaller dataset)
onlynew: train it1 only on new selfplay-it0 (overfit, early-stopped at 1200 steps)
lowerlr (lr=3e-4 vs 1e-3) — regressed; default LR is the right size for warm-resume
dirichlet noise enabled — marginal +0.001 over baseline (within noise but kept)
strong25 (25 games x 2048 sims, dirichlet on) — fewer games hurts more than stronger MCTS helps
baseline_v2 variance check — same setup as baseline_v1 (0.3377) but 0.32 lower; variance is ~0.03
dirichlet_v2 (2nd sample) — confirms dirichlet ~0.336 vs baseline ~0.322 (small but reproducible)
lowvalweight (0.25x value loss) — hurt vs dirichlet_v2 on same data; value loss is useful aux regularizer
hightemp (T=0.6 + dirichlet) — too much exploration hurts
lowtemp (T=0.1 + dirichlet, 42 games due to 95.133 host fail) — neither lower nor higher T helps; T=0.3 sweet spot
bs256+dirichlet on bs256 phase A — Phase B regressed; bs256 phaseA gain was likely variance
more100 (100 games x 512 sims, dirichlet) — within noise of baseline; 50x1024 is sweet spot
highwd (1e-2 vs 5e-3) — below dirichlet mean; default WD is right
